backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining the JARVIS backend with user profile storage, registration, login, and settings update endpoints (wake word, language, mode, mentor, conversation memory), all protected by role-based access control via MixinAuthorization and AccessControl.
feature_evidence.json: JSON report mapping implemented feature IDs to their source files, related components, test IDs, and confidence levels, covering speech greeting on login, voice command parsing, mentor dialogue authenticity, and other JARVIS assistant features.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document providing one-sentence descriptions of every frontend source file, serving as a quick-reference index of each component, hook, and page in the React frontend.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point that defines light and dark CSS custom property tokens (colors, radius, chart palette, sidebar) used throughout the JARVIS UI.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the JARVIS React app that loads Orbitron, Rajdhani, and Share Tech Mono fonts from Google Fonts and mounts the Vite/React entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with public routes (login, register) and AuthGuard-protected routes (transition, dashboard, settings), redirecting unauthenticated or unregistered users to login.
frontend/src/components/AppHeader.tsx: Top navigation header displaying the JARVIS logo, assistant status indicator, version badge, mode toggle, settings button, user avatar, and logout button, consuming the AssistantState type from useVoiceAssistant.
frontend/src/components/ArcReactorCore.t: Renders an animated 3D Arc Reactor visualization using React Three Fiber, featuring rotating torus rings, a pulsing core sphere, and floating particles that speed up when the assistant is active.
frontend/src/components/BrightnessOverla: A fixed full-screen black overlay div used to control screen brightness via CSS opacity transitions.
Displays a scrollable chat log of user and JARVIS conversation entries with timestamps, and shows an interim transcript while the user is speaking.
frontend/src/components/HolographicBackg: Draws an animated canvas background featuring a hex grid, radial glow, a moving scan line, and floating particles to create a holographic UI effect.
frontend/src/components/HUDRings.tsx: Renders an animated canvas-based HUD ring display with rotating dashed arcs, tick marks, and a center glow that changes color based on the assistant's current state.
frontend/src/components/LanguageSelector: Provides a dropdown UI for selecting the assistant's language, persisting the choice via a mutation hook and noting that voice commands can also change the language.
frontend/src/components/MemoryPanel.tsx: Displays stored conversation memory entries in a scrollable list and provides a two-step confirmation button to clear all memory entries.
frontend/src/components/MentorCard.tsx: Displays a mentor character card with motivational messages, greetings, and challenges, and uses the Web Speech API to auto-speak content on mount and on user interaction.
frontend/src/components/MentorSettings.t: Renders a settings panel for selecting or typing a mentor character name from presets, saving the choice via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/ModeToggle.tsx: A toggle button that switches the user profile between 'professional' and 'personal' modes using a mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/PasswordInput.ts: A password input field component with a toggle button to show or hide the password text.
Provides UI controls for adjusting app-level volume and brightness, scrolling, opening URLs in the OS browser, and searching Wikipedia, with capability badges clarifying browser vs. OS limitations.
frontend/src/components/SearchResultPane: A modal overlay that displays a Wikipedia search result with title, thumbnail, summary, and a link to the full article.
Displays a colored, optionally pulsing status badge reflecting the current voice assistant state (idle, listening, processing, speaking, etc.).
frontend/src/components/ThemedPanel.tsx: A reusable styled panel container supporting cyan/gold/dark variants, an optional title header, and optional corner bracket decoration.
frontend/src/components/VoiceControlButt: A circular microphone button that visually reflects the voice assistant state (listening, processing, speaking) with animated pulse rings and appropriate icons.
frontend/src/components/WakeWordSettings: A React component that renders a settings panel allowing users to view and update their voice assistant wake word, using the useSetWakeWord mutation hook and displaying save feedback.
frontend/src/components/WaveformVisualiz: A canvas-based React component that animates a bar waveform visualizer with different colors and motion patterns depending on the current state (idle, listening, processing, speaking, wake-listening).
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and persisting identity across page reloads via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/usePCControls.ts: A custom hook that exposes browser-level PC controls including Web Audio API volume adjustment, CSS overlay brightness control, scroll, and URL/Wikipedia search utilities.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend interactions including user profile CRUD, authentication (register/login), and settings mutations (wake word, language, mode, mentor).
A React hook that wraps the Web Speech Recognition API, providing start/stop controls, interim and final transcript state, auto-restart support, and error handling via configurable callbacks.
frontend/src/hooks/useSpeechSynthesis.ts: A React hook that wraps the Web Speech Synthesis API, exposing speak/cancel functions, speaking state, available voices, and automatic cleanup on unmount.
frontend/src/hooks/useVoiceAssistant.ts: A comprehensive voice assistant hook that manages wake-word detection, speech recognition, command parsing (including Telugu transliteration), PC controls, and conversation log state for the JARVIS assistant.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that configures Tailwind base/components/utilities, defines JARVIS-themed OKLCH CSS custom properties, and provides reusable component classes like jarvis-panel, jarvis-glow-text, and jarvis-btn.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with React Query and InternetIdentity providers wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: The main dashboard page that composes the JARVIS UI—including holographic background, HUD rings, waveform visualizer, conversation log, and PC controls—wired to the useVoiceAssistant hook and user profile data.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page that handles Internet Identity authentication and email/password login, displaying a JARVIS-themed form with animated decorations and error feedback.
frontend/src/pages/RegisterPage.tsx: Registration page component that handles new user sign-up by connecting an Internet Identity, validating form inputs (username, email, password), and calling the register mutation before redirecting to login on success.
frontend/src/pages/SettingsPage.tsx: Settings page with tabbed navigation (voice, language, mentor, memory) that loads the user profile and renders corresponding settings components like WakeWordSettings, LanguageSelector, MentorSettings, and MemoryPanel.
frontend/src/pages/TransitionScreen.tsx: Boot sequence transition screen that displays a typewriter-animated list of system initialization lines, speaks a time-based greeting via the Web Speech API, then navigates to the dashboard after ~3.2 seconds.
frontend/src/types/speechRecognition.ts: Defines TypeScript interfaces for the Web Speech API (SpeechRecognition, events, results) and augments the global Window type with SpeechRecognition and webkitSpeechRecognition constructors as a single source of truth.
frontend/src/utils/languageMaps.ts: Exports a list of 40+ supported languages with BCP-47 codes and native names, along with utility functions to convert between language names and codes and to detect a language name from a transcript string.
frontend/src/utils/mentorMessages.ts: Defines motivational message data structures and pre-populated message arrays for anime-inspired mentor personas (Rengoku and Naruto), including categorized messages, greetings, and daily challenges.
frontend/src/utils/timeGreeting.ts: Provides two small utility functions that return a time-of-day greeting string ('Good Morning/Afternoon/Evening') and a corresponding emoji based on the current hour.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/src/utils/wikipediaApi.ts: Fetches a Wikipedia article summary by title using the REST API, falling back to an OpenSearch query if the direct lookup returns a 404.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom fonts, an extended OKLCH-based color palette (including a 'jarvis' theme), border radii, shadows, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state document describing a JARVIS-inspired desktop AI assistant app with known issues (broken voice interaction, unexecuted PC controls, non-authentic mentor voices) and a list of existing and planned features.
